caption: In a formal assembly hall with wood-paneled walls and green benches, a large group of people are gathered, many of whom are standing and clapping. The assembly consists of men and women wearing a variety of traditional Indian attire, including white kurtas, colorful saris, and orange turbans. Several individuals in the front and middle rows are wearing bright yellow or orange clothing. In the center of the crowd, a man in a white kurta stands facing the others, while those around him applaud. The sequence shows the people maintaining their positions while continuing to clap, with slight shifts in their gestures and expressions as they react to the proceedings. No on-screen text or logos are visible. The lighting is bright and consistent across the scene, highlighting the formal and celebratory atmosphere of the gathering.
